headline: India's platform for winning every protection claim.
subhead: From the policy you just bought to the rejection you're fighting today — from the scheme you didn't know existed to the money a loved one left unclaimed. One platform for every chapter of your family's protection.
secondaryCta: See schemes my family qualifies for — free
trustSignal: No broker license. No policy pushing. Independent advocacy, on your side only.

stats.label: Eligible families never enrolled in PM-JAY

steps.heading: Tell us where you are in the journey
steps.body: Preparing for a claim you may need tomorrow. In the middle of one right now. Or recovering what's owed from something that already happened.

steps.heading: Get a clear, personalised answer
steps.body: In plain language. In your language. Every claim you have — on an insurer, the government, or a bank — read by an AI trained on Indian protection law.

steps.heading: We stay with you until you win
steps.body: Your analyses, your schemes, your cases — remembered. Before, during, and after. We're your family's protection record for life.

before.label: Before
before.title: Know what you have. Fix the gaps.
before.subtitle: The moment begins long before a hospital bed. Understand your policy, score your family's adequacy, discover the schemes you qualify for — all before anything goes wrong.

during.label: During
during.title: When the moment hits, we take it on.
during.subtitle: A hospital refuses your card. An insurer stonewalls you. Your business faces a claim. Real-time guidance, regulator-ready escalation, scripts in your language.

after.label: After
after.title: The money you're owed — recovered.
after.subtitle: A rejection you want to fight. A deceased relative's benefit nobody told your family about. A ULIP your parent was mis-sold. We help you get back what's yours.
